title: Strider (freighter)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Strider''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] in the service of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. The freighter was scheduled to arrive with the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Mayhem]]'' with base equipment along with the freighters ''[[Treader]]'' and [[Walker (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Walker'']]. However the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] attacked and destroyed the freighter along with ''Treader'' and after, liberating the [[Habassa]] slaves, the ''Walker'' as well.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
